name: move_event
description: Propose moving an existing calendar event to a new date and/or time. The user will confirm before any change is made. Use when the user wants to reschedule or move an event.

event_title.description: Title of the event to move (case-insensitive match).

current_date.description: Current date of the event in YYYY-MM-DD format.

new_date.description: New date for the event in YYYY-MM-DD format.

new_start_time.description: New start time in HH:MM (24-hour) format.

new_end_time.description: New end time in HH:MM (24-hour) format.
